$schema: Editor layout archetypes — the shell configurations a design-tool suite needs. Regions map to shell/ components; each archetype is one screen in ui_kits/editor.

archetypes.name: Design editor
archetypes.for: Vector/product design (Figma Design, Framer, Sketch class)

regions.canvas: Infinite canvas, coarse dot grid, stickies/connectors
regions.floating: Bottom-center floating toolbar (big tools), zoom HUD

archetypes.name: Slides
archetypes.for: Deck editing (Figma Slides, Canva Docs/Präsi class)

regions.left: Filmstrip: slide thumbnails, drag to reorder

archetypes.name: Site builder
archetypes.for: Responsive web design (Figma Sites, Framer Sites class)

regions.canvas: Vertically scrolling page at active breakpoint width

archetypes.name: Batch assets
archetypes.for: On-brand marketing assets at scale (Figma Buzz, Canva bulk class)

regions.canvas: Grid of generated variants (one per collection record)

regions.bottom: Prompt composer docked in left panel

regions.right: Code panel: tokens, CSS, assets download
